notes.subject: Re: Booking Request - DJ Horizon for Equinox Festival
notes.body: I have one question about the contract. In section 5.3, it mentions that the festival must provide a dedicated sound engineer for DJ Horizon's set. This wasn't mentioned in our earlier discussions. We have a festival sound engineer who handles all main stage performances. Would this be sufficient, or does DJ Horizon require their own dedicated engineer?

actual.subject: Re: Booking Request - DJ Horizon for Equinox Festival
actual.body: I have one question about the contract. In section 5.3, it mentions that the festival must provide a dedicated sound engineer for DJ Horizon's set. Would this be sufficient, or does DJ Horizon require their own dedicated engineer?

notes.subject: Re: Booking Request - DJ Horizon for Equinox Festival
notes.body: I have one question about the contract. In section 5.3, it mentions that the festival must provide a dedicated sound engineer for DJ Horizon's set. This wasn't mentioned in our earlier discussions. We have a festival sound engineer who handles all main stage performances. Would this be sufficient, or does DJ Horizon require their own dedicated engineer?

notes.subject: Re: Booking Request - DJ Horizon for Equinox Festival
notes.body:
Thanks for pointing this out. Your festival sound engineer will be sufficient, as long as they're available during DJ Horizon's set to ensure levels are properly maintained and to respond to any technical issues.

I've attached a revised contract with this clarification in section 5.3. The rest remains unchanged.

Let me know if you have any other questions.

Best regards,
<DJ_Horizon_Equinox_Contract_Revised.pdf>
